title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Jetking Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Jetking Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Jetking Ventures Solutions in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Jetking Ventures Solutions:
Jetking Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking Ventures Solutions!
